seo.metaTitle: Partner Marketing Programs for Service Providers | Hostopia
seo.metaDescription: Extend your marketing team with Hostopia. Demand generation, MDF management, campaign execution, and turnkey assets — built for service providers selling digital services to SMBs.

hero.headline: Your Marketing Team, Extended
hero.subheadline: Telecom and SMB marketing expertise at your fingertips — from go-to-market strategy and campaign execution to MDF management and turnkey creative assets.

howItWorks.heading: An Extension of Your Team
howItWorks.intro: Hostopia's Partner Marketing managers work alongside your marketing and sales teams. We bring deep experience in telecom, SMB markets, and channel marketing — applied to your goals, your segments, and your competitive landscape.

cards.title: Go-to-Market Strategy
cards.body: We help define your target market, ideal customer profile, pricing models, and distribution channels — shortening time to market and reducing risk.

cards.title: Demand Generation
cards.body: Lead generation, segment marketing, data enrichment, and offer strategy — executed across email, landing pages, digital ads, and direct channels.

cards.title: MDF Management
cards.body: We establish and manage Marketing Development Funds on your behalf, leveraging pre-built tools and programs at scale. Funds are proactively managed to drive results, not sit idle.

cards.title: Turnkey Creative Assets
cards.body: Through Hostopia Connects, access downloadable white-label materials: videos, landing pages, collateral, sales scripts, and objection handlers — all customizable to your brand.

columns.title: Acquire
columns.body: Bundling strategies, data enrichment, segment marketing, and lead generation to bring new SMB customers into your portfolio.

columns.title: Grow
columns.body: Channel strategy, engagement tools, vertical marketing, and Right-Time Engagement (RTE) to automate upsell at the right moment.

columns.title: Retain
columns.body: Onboarding and activation programs, value messaging, and engagement strategies that keep customers active and reduce churn.

items.title: Dedicated Partner Marketing Manager
items.body: A named resource who knows your business, customers, and goals.

items.title: Pre-Launch and Post-Launch Support
items.body: From positioning through ongoing performance optimization.

items.title: Performance-Driven Programs
items.body: Tracked CAC, campaign ROI, and regular reporting.

items.title: Global Capability
items.body: Programs adapted to local markets and languages.

cta.headline: Let's Build Your Next Campaign
cta.body: Tell us your goals and we'll show you how Hostopia's Partner Marketing team can help — whether it's a full go-to-market plan or a single campaign.
